{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Source
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Traveler]]'s [[Source]] is a pool of energy that can be used to power [[Lirial]] devices.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] can tap into her [[Source]] to encase people in crystal.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
